title: Titan Company is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Titan Company is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Titan Company! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Titan Company:
Titan Company is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Company!
